description: arXiv:2607.13239v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Foundation models, including large language models (LLMs) and vision-language models (VLMs), are increasingly used for transportation management center (TMC) tasks such as anomaly detection, incident reporting, and traveler information. Deploying multiple such models across TMC functions raises a portfolio question: which model should serve each f...
author: Xi Cheng, Ke Liu, Siyuan Feng, Jane Lin, H. Oliver Gao
